default-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' data: https://aztec-mainnet.drpc.org https://ethereum-rpc.publicnode.com https://rpc.testnet.aztec-labs.com https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com; frame-src 'none'

headers.comment: Hashed build assets are content-addressed — safe to cache forever. This block is matched AFTER ** so its Cache-Control overrides the no-cache default (serve-handler is last-match-wins per header key). The HTML shells stay no-cache so a redeploy is picked up on the next load instead of booting a stale entry bundle that imports now-deleted chunks.
